message:
fix(fts5): recognize maintenance INSERT commands in deferred dispatch preflight

The prepared_insert_requires_deferred_dispatch() method only checked
attached_target_schema(), which missed FTS5 maintenance commands like
INSERT INTO docs(docs) VALUES('optimize'). These commands target the
content table's shadow namespace and do not match any attached schema,
causing them to be routed to the wrong execution path after reopen of
a materialized FTS5 table.

Now also checks fts5_maintenance_insert_command() first, so optimize,
merge, rebuild, and other maintenance INSERTs are correctly identified
as requiring deferred dispatch regardless of schema attachment state.

- Add fts5_maintenance_insert_command() to the dispatch preflight OR chain
- Add test_reopen_materialized_fts5_optimize_command_succeeds: creates an
  FTS5 table, closes, reopens, verifies MATCH query works, then runs the
  INSERT INTO docs(docs) VALUES('optimize') maintenance command and
  confirms the row count is preserved

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
